## Summary

- what changed
- why it changed

## Validation

- [ ] `go test ./...`
- [ ] relevant manual validation performed
- [ ] docs updated if behavior changed

## Checklist

- [ ] scope is focused and avoids unrelated cleanup
- [ ] CLI/server boundary is preserved where relevant
- [ ] no hosted-product/private-repo content was introduced into OSS docs or code by mistake
- [ ] breaking changes are called out explicitly

## Notes for reviewers

Anything that would help reviewers test or reason about the change.
